'''ân-k-j''' ('''kanakaj''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:impeed|impeed]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-k-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:impeed|impeed]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ân-k-j
|-
! Lemma
| kanakaj
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thinakaj|thinakaj]] || [[word:jinakaj|jinakaj]] || [[word:shinakaj|shinakaj]] || [[word:kinakaj|kinakaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthunakaj|thuthunakaj]] || [[word:jujunakaj|jujunakaj]] || [[word:shushunakaj|shushunakaj]] || [[word:kukunakaj|kukunakaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thunakaj|thunakaj]] || [[word:junakaj|junakaj]] || [[word:shunakaj|shunakaj]] || [[word:kunakaj|kunakaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thunakaj|thunakaj]] || [[word:junakaj|junakaj]] || [[word:shunakaj|shunakaj]] || [[word:kunakaj|kunakaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thenakaj|thenakaj]] || [[word:jenakaj|jenakaj]] || [[word:shenakaj|shenakaj]] || [[word:kenakaj|kenakaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothonakaj|thothonakaj]] || [[word:jojonakaj|jojonakaj]] || [[word:shoshonakaj|shoshonakaj]] || [[word:kokonakaj|kokonakaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thonakaj|thonakaj]] || [[word:jonakaj|jonakaj]] || [[word:shonakaj|shonakaj]] || [[word:konakaj|konakaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thonakaj|thonakaj]] || [[word:jonakaj|jonakaj]] || [[word:shonakaj|shonakaj]] || [[word:konakaj|konakaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠnakaj|thĂŠnakaj]] || [[word:jĂŠnakaj|jĂŠnakaj]] || [[word:shĂŠnakaj|shĂŠnakaj]] || [[word:kĂŠnakaj|kĂŠnakaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathanakaj|thathanakaj]] || [[word:jajanakaj|jajanakaj]] || [[word:shashanakaj|shashanakaj]] || [[word:kakanakaj|kakanakaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thanakaj|thanakaj]] || [[word:janakaj|janakaj]] || [[word:shanakaj|shanakaj]] || [[word:kanakaj|kanakaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thanakaj|thanakaj]] || [[word:janakaj|janakaj]] || [[word:shanakaj|shanakaj]] || [[word:kanakaj|kanakaj]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shanakaj|shanakaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshanakaj|goshanakaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishanakaj|gokishanakaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shanakajnĂŒ|shanakajnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshanakajnknĂŒ|goshanakajnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishanakajnĂŒ|gokishanakajnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shanakajshĂ«|shanakajshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshanakajnkshĂ«|goshanakajnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishanakajshĂ«|gokishanakajshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanakajro|shanakajro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanakajnkro|goshanakajnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanakajro|gokishanakajro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shanakajmu|shanakajmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanakajnkmu|goshanakajnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanakajmu|gokishanakajmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shanakajsher|shanakajsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshanakajnksher|goshanakajnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishanakajsher|gokishanakajsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shanakajng|shanakajng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshanakajnkng|goshanakajnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishanakajng|gokishanakajng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shanakajya|shanakajya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshanakajnkya|goshanakajnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishanakajya|gokishanakajya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shanakajyam|shanakajyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshanakajnkyam|goshanakajnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishanakajyam|gokishanakajyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanakajnĂŒshĂ«|shanakajnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanakajnknĂŒshĂ«|goshanakajnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanakajnĂŒshĂ«|gokishanakajnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanakajnĂŒro|shanakajnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanakajnknĂŒro|goshanakajnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanakajnĂŒro|gokishanakajnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanakajnĂŒmu|shanakajnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanakajnknĂŒmu|goshanakajnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanakajnĂŒmu|gokishanakajnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanakajshĂ«nĂŒ|shanakajshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanakajnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshanakajnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanakajshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishanakajshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanakajshĂ«ro|shanakajshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanakajnkshĂ«ro|goshanakajnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanakajshĂ«ro|gokishanakajshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanakajshĂ«mu|shanakajshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanakajnkshĂ«mu|goshanakajnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanakajshĂ«mu|gokishanakajshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanakajronĂŒ|shanakajronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanakajnkronĂŒ|goshanakajnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanakajronĂŒ|gokishanakajronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanakajroshĂ«|shanakajroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanakajnkroshĂ«|goshanakajnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanakajroshĂ«|gokishanakajroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanakajromu|shanakajromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanakajnkromu|goshanakajnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanakajromu|gokishanakajromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanakajmunĂŒ|shanakajmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanakajnkmunĂŒ|goshanakajnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanakajmunĂŒ|gokishanakajmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanakajmushĂ«|shanakajmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanakajnkmushĂ«|goshanakajnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanakajmushĂ«|gokishanakajmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanakajmuro|shanakajmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanakajnkmuro|goshanakajnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanakajmuro|gokishanakajmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|a6f1c69}}
